initial_candidates.sql:
WITH daily_inserts AS (
  SELECT 
    country_code_2,
    insert_date,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY country_code_2 ORDER BY insert_date) AS rn
  FROM cities
  WHERE insert_date BETWEEN '2022-06-01' AND '2022-06-30'
),
consecutive_groups AS (
  SELECT 
    country_code_2,
    insert_date,
    DATE(insert_date, '-' || CAST(rn AS TEXT) || ' days') AS grp
  FROM daily_inserts
),
streaks AS (
  SELECT 
    country_code_2,
    grp,
    COUNT(*) AS streak_length
  FROM consecutive_groups
  GROUP BY country_code_2, grp
),
max_streaks AS (
  SELECT 
    country_code_2,
    MAX(streak_length) AS max_streak
  FROM streaks
  GROUP BY country_code_2
),
final_countries AS (
  SELECT 
    s.country_code_2
  FROM streaks s
  JOIN max_streaks m ON s.country_code_2 = m.country_code_2 AND s.streak_length = m.max_streak
)
SELECT country_code_2
FROM final_countries;

WITH daily_inserts AS (
    SELECT 
        country_code_2,
        DATE(insert_date) AS insert_day
    FROM cities
    WHERE insert_date BETWEEN '2022-06-01' AND '2022-06-30'
),
ordered_inserts AS (
    SELECT 
        country_code_2,
        insert_day,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY country_code_2 ORDER BY insert_day) AS row_num
    FROM daily_inserts
),
streak_groups AS (
    SELECT 
        country_code_2,
        insert_day,
        DATE(insert_day, '-' || row_num || ' days') AS streak_group
    FROM ordered_inserts
),
streak_lengths AS (
    SELECT 
        country_code_2,
        streak_group,
        COUNT(*) AS streak_length
    FROM streak_groups
    GROUP BY country_code_2, streak_group
),
max_streaks AS (
    SELECT 
        country_code_2,
        MAX(streak_length) AS max_streak
    FROM streak_lengths
    GROUP BY country_code_2
),
global_max AS (
    SELECT MAX(max_streak) AS max_overall
    FROM max_streaks
)
SELECT 
    s.country_code_2
FROM max_streaks s
JOIN global_max g ON s.max_streak = g.max_overall;

WITH daily_cities AS (
    SELECT 
        country_code_2,
        insert_date,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY country_code_2 ORDER BY insert_date) AS row_num
    FROM cities
    WHERE insert_date BETWEEN '2022-06-01' AND '2022-06-30'
),
consecutive_groups AS (
    SELECT 
        country_code_2,
        insert_date,
        date(insert_date, '-' || row_num || ' days') AS grp
    FROM daily_cities
),
streaks AS (
    SELECT 
        country_code_2,
        grp,
        COUNT(*) AS streak_length
    FROM consecutive_groups
    GROUP BY country_code_2, grp
),
max_streaks AS (
    SELECT 
        country_code_2,
        MAX(streak_length) AS max_streak
    FROM streaks
    GROUP BY country_code_2
),
overall_max AS (
    SELECT MAX(max_streak) AS overall_max_streak
    FROM max_streaks
)
SELECT 
    s.country_code_2
FROM streaks s
JOIN max_streaks ms ON s.country_code_2 = ms.country_code_2 AND s.streak_length = ms.max_streak
CROSS JOIN overall_max om
WHERE s.streak_length = om.overall_max_streak
ORDER BY s.country_code_2;

WITH daily_inserts AS (
    SELECT 
        country_code_2,
        insert_date,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY country_code_2 ORDER BY insert_date) AS rn
    FROM cities
    WHERE insert_date BETWEEN '2022-06-01' AND '2022-06-30'
),
consecutive_groups AS (
    SELECT 
        country_code_2,
        insert_date,
        julianday(insert_date) - rn AS grp
    FROM daily_inserts
),
streaks AS (
    SELECT 
        country_code_2,
        grp,
        COUNT(*) AS streak_length
    FROM consecutive_groups
    GROUP BY country_code_2, grp
),
max_streaks AS (
    SELECT 
        country_code_2,
        MAX(streak_length) AS max_streak
    FROM streaks
    GROUP BY country_code_2
),
global_max AS (
    SELECT MAX(max_streak) AS global_max_streak
    FROM max_streaks
)
SELECT 
    ms.country_code_2
FROM max_streaks ms
JOIN global_max gm ON ms.max_streak = gm.global_max_streak;

WITH daily_inserts AS (
  SELECT 
    country_code_2,
    insert_date,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY country_code_2 ORDER BY insert_date) AS row_num
  FROM cities
  WHERE insert_date BETWEEN '2022-06-01' AND '2022-06-30'
),
consecutive_groups AS (
  SELECT 
    country_code_2,
    insert_date,
    DATE(insert_date, '-' || row_num || ' days') AS grp
  FROM daily_inserts
),
streaks AS (
  SELECT 
    country_code_2,
    grp,
    COUNT(*) AS streak_length
  FROM consecutive_groups
  GROUP BY country_code_2, grp
),
max_streaks AS (
  SELECT 
    country_code_2,
    MAX(streak_length) AS max_streak
  FROM streaks
  GROUP BY country_code_2
),
longest_streaks AS (
  SELECT 
    s.country_code_2
  FROM streaks s
  JOIN max_streaks m ON s.country_code_2 = m.country_code_2 AND s.streak_length = m.max_streak
)
SELECT DISTINCT country_code_2
FROM longest_streaks;
